records.title: vendor pricing note
records.text_summary: Vendor comparison note. The stable facts are that AlphaAI uses usage-based pricing, BetaStack offers a flat enterprise plan, and GammaCloud requires annual commitment for the lower tier. Noise: the transcript also mentions unrelated launch rumors, conference gossip, generic cloud trend commentary, and old roadmap guesses that are not decision-relevant.

records.title: vendor context window note
records.text_summary: Context window comparison. AlphaAI supports 200k context, BetaStack supports 128k context, and GammaCloud supports 1M context in preview. Noise includes speculative benchmark chatter, old screenshots, and non-source discussion about future multimodal releases.

records.title: vendor api compatibility note
records.text_summary: API compatibility comparison. AlphaAI exposes an OpenAI-compatible endpoint, BetaStack requires a proprietary SDK, and GammaCloud supports both REST and batch ingestion. Noise includes historical billing incidents, unrelated compliance debates, and generic analyst commentary.

records.title: distilled vendor evidence
records.text_summary: Distilled evidence: pricing facts are usage-based pricing for AlphaAI, flat enterprise plan for BetaStack, and annual commitment for GammaCloud. Context facts are 200k context, 128k context, and 1M context. API facts are OpenAI-compatible endpoint, proprietary SDK, and REST and batch ingestion.

records.title: vendor comparison fact
records.text_summary: Stable fact: preserve the exact comparison fields and exact findings. Pricing: usage-based pricing, flat enterprise plan, annual commitment. Context: 200k context, 128k context, 1M context. API compatibility: OpenAI-compatible endpoint, proprietary SDK, REST and batch ingestion.
